channel.title: GitHub ZenScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of ZenScript in GitHub

item.title: DarkPacks/SkyFactory-4
item.description: SkyFactory 4 offers a brand-new experience never before seen in the series. Full automation, tech, magic, and bacon resources! This iteration offers over 30+ world types so you can play the pack like never before!

item.title: DarkPacks/SevTech-Ages
item.description: SevTech: Ages is a massive Minecraft modpack packed with content and progression.
